dashboard.createFirstAgent: Create your first AI agent to start handling conversations

industryGreeting.Hotel: Manage your hotel AI concierge agents
industryGreeting.Retail: Manage your retail AI shopping assistants
industryGreeting.Restaurant: Manage your restaurant AI service agents

agents.title: My Agents
agents.subtitle: Create and manage your AI chatbot agents
agents.noAgentsSubtitle: Create your first AI agent to get started
agents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agent?

form.topicHintDesc: Each agent handles one specific topic. For example, for a Hotel, you can create a specific 'Nearby Food Recommendation' agent and a separate 'Room Service' agent. Each topic has different knowledge data.
form.customTopicDesc: Describe your topic and AI will automatically generate relevant knowledge fields.
form.customTopicPlaceholder: Example: cheap halal food recommendations, property investment tips...
form.generalKnowledgeDesc: This agent will automatically read {count} general knowledge sources from the General Knowledge Base + business info from Settings.
form.topicKnowledgeDesc: Fill in specific data for this topic. This data is ADDED on top of general knowledge. The more detailed, the more accurate the AI answers.
form.mapSearchError: No places found nearby this address
form.uploadDesc: Upload additional files specific to this topic (brochures, PDF price lists, etc.)
form.profileDesc: The following identity and instructions are generated by AI. You can still adjust them as needed.
form.aiGenerateHint: ✨ Recommended: Let AI generate the best settings based on your knowledge data.
form.placeholderGoal: What is the main task of this agent?
form.placeholderInstructions: Write detailed rules for the agent here...
form.aiGenerateSuccess: ✨ Agent profile successfully generated by AI!
form.aiQuotaError: Free AI limit exceeded! Please wait a few seconds before trying again.
form.addressNotSet: Business address not set in Settings

nearby_food.label: Nearby Food Recommendations
nearby_food.description: AI will recommend places to eat near the hotel

restaurant_list.label: List of Nearby Restaurants/Stalls
restaurant_list.placeholder:
Example:
1. Sari Bundo Padang Stall — 200m, Halal, $1-2
2. Kimchi House Korean Restaurant — 500m, Non-Halal, $3-6
3. Local Coffee Shop — 100m, $1

hotel_restaurant.label: Hotel Restaurant
hotel_restaurant.placeholder: Example: Sky Lounge Rooftop — Open 07:00-22:00, Buffet menu $10/person

nearby_attractions.label: Nearby Attractions
nearby_attractions.description: AI will recommend tourist spots and entertainment nearby

attractions.label: List of Tourist Spots
attractions.placeholder:
Example:
1. Kuta Beach — 2km, free entry, open 24h
2. Art Museum — 500m, entry $2, open 09:00-17:00

transport.label: Available Transport
transport.placeholder: Example: Grab/Gojek, free hotel shuttle to mall, bike rental $5/day

room_service.label: Room Service & Facilities
room_service.description: AI will answer questions about rooms and hotel facilities

room_types.label: Room Types & Prices
room_types.placeholder:
Example:
- Standard Room: $35/night, 1 King Bed, WiFi, AC
- Deluxe: $55/night, 1 King Bed, Balcony, Minibar
- Suite: $100/night, Living Room, Jacuzzi

facilities.label: Hotel Facilities
facilities.placeholder: Example: Swimming Pool (07:00-21:00), Gym (24h), Spa (10:00-20:00), Laundry

checkin.label: Check-in/Check-out Time
checkin.placeholder: Check-in: 14:00, Check-out: 12:00, Early check-in available with extra charge

concierge.label: General Concierge
concierge.description: AI answers all guest questions about the hotel

faq.label: FAQ / Common Questions
faq.placeholder:
Example:
Q: Is there free WiFi?
A: Yes, free WiFi is available throughout the hotel. Password: WELCOME2024

Q: How to get to the airport?
A: Hotel provides airport shuttle ($7/person), book 4 hours in advance

policies.label: Hotel Policies
policies.placeholder: Example: No smoking policy, Pet friendly ($15 extra), Free cancellation H-1

product_catalog.label: Product Catalog
product_catalog.description: AI answers questions about available products

products.label: Product List
products.placeholder:
Example:
1. iPhone 15 Pro Max — $1500, Apple Unit, 1 year warranty
2. Samsung S24 Ultra — $1300, Official warranty

promos.label: Active Promos & Discounts
promos.placeholder: Example: 20% discount for all accessories, 0% installments via Credit Card

store_info.label: Store Info & Shipping
store_info.description: AI answers about store location, hours, and shipping

branches.label: Branches / Store Locations
branches.placeholder:
Example:
1. Sudirman Branch — Sudirman St No.12, open 10:00-22:00
2. Grand Mall Branch — 2nd Floor Unit 201, open 10:00-21:30

shipping.label: Shipping Info
shipping.placeholder: Example: JNE, J&T, SiCepat, Same-day delivery via Courier

return_policy.label: Return Policy
return_policy.placeholder: Example: Return within 7 days, product unopened, include receipt

menu.label: Menu & Recommendations
menu.description: AI helps customers choose menu items

menu_items.label: Menu List
menu_items.placeholder:
Example:
APPETIZER:
- Balinese Sate Lilit — $2.5, Mild spicy
- Caesar Salad — $2, Vegetarian

MAIN COURSE:
- Seafood Fried Rice — $4
- Wagyu Steak 200gr — $18

specialties.label: Signature Menu / Chef Recommendation
specialties.placeholder: Example: Balinese Crispy Duck (best seller), Rijsttafel package for 4 persons

dietary.label: Dietary Options / Allergies
dietary.placeholder: Available: Vegetarian, Vegan, Gluten-free, Halal certified

reservation.label: Reservation & Info
reservation.description: AI helps with reservations and restaurant info

booking_info.label: Reservation Info
booking_info.placeholder: Example: Reservation via WhatsApp 081234567890, at least 2 hours in advance, deposit $7 for groups >6 persons

capacity.label: Capacity & Areas
capacity.placeholder: Example: Indoor 50 pax, Outdoor Garden 30 pax, Private Room 12 pax

property_listing.label: Property Listing
property_listing.description: AI helps potential buyers/tenants find properties

properties.label: Property List
properties.placeholder:
Example:
1. Bintaro House Sector 9 — $150k, 3BR/2BA, Freehold
2. Sudirman Park Apartment — $550/month, Studio 28sqm, Full Furnished

facilities_area.label: Area Facilities / Neighborhood
facilities_area.placeholder: Example: Near international school, Hospital 2km, direct toll access

consultation.label: Property Consultation
consultation.description: AI helps with mortgage consultation, investment, etc.

kpr_info.label: Mortgage & Payment Info
kpr_info.placeholder: Example: Mortgage partnership with BCA, Mandiri, BTN. DP from 10%, 20-year tenor

faq.label: Property FAQ
faq.placeholder:
Q: What documents are required?
A: ID Card, Tax ID, 3 months payslip, Bank statement

faq.label: FAQ / Common Questions
faq.placeholder: Enter frequently asked questions and answers here...

custom.label: Custom Topic
custom.description: Create a custom agent topic as needed

custom_knowledge.label: Knowledge Data
custom_knowledge.placeholder: Enter information relevant to this agent topic...

knowledge.title: General Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Company knowledge data used by all your agents.
knowledge.bannerDesc: This data will be the foundation of common knowledge for all your AI agents. Enter complete information about the company: business description, services, SOP, FAQ, policies, etc. Each agent will automatically read this data + its specific topic knowledge.
knowledge.textContentPlaceholder:
Paste complete info about your company here...

Example:
- Business description and services
- Service SOPs
- Customer FAQs
- Policies & procedures
- Product / facility info
knowledge.uploadTitle: Click to upload or drag and drop
knowledge.startHint: Start by adding information about your business.
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this knowledge?
knowledge.urlScrapeWarning: ⚠️ Scraping websites consumes a significant amount of tokens (can be 10,000+ tokens per page). Make sure the URL being scraped is absolutely necessary.
knowledge.urlScrapeConfirm:
⚠️ This URL has been scraped before.

Re-scraping will consume significant additional tokens.

Are you sure you want to re-scrape?
knowledge.crawlStarted: 🕷️ Crawling started! You can leave this page while waiting. Notification will appear when finished.

analytics.title: Analytics & History
analytics.subtitle: Monitor conversations, token usage, and Live Analysis per agent topic.
analytics.analyzingDesc: AI is reading all chats in this topic
analytics.noAnalysisData: No specific orders or customer data found in these conversations.
analytics.runAnalysisHint: Click 'Run Analysis' on a topic in the left column

complaints.title: Complaint Handling
complaints.subtitle: Manage customer complaints from chat and voice sessions
complaints.clickHint: Click a complaint to view details

settings.title: Settings
settings.placeholderAddress: Example: Jl. Sudirman No.123, Senayan, Kebayoran Baru
settings.placeholderDesc: Describe your business briefly... Example: 4-star hotel in central Jakarta providing premium services for business and family travelers.
settings.apiKeyDesc: API key is securely managed on the server.

Retail.payment_placeholder: Example: Cash, Debit, Credit, QRIS, OVO, GoPay
